scale.code: text-sm font-mono bg-zinc-900/50 p-1 rounded text-zinc-300

components.glass_card: bg-zinc-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl hover:border-white/10 transition-all duration-300
components.neon_button: relative px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium tracking-wide overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 group
components.neon_button_outline: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40
components.nav: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6
components.season_badge: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border

visual_enhancers.gradient_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-zinc-200 to-zinc-500
visual_enhancers.noise_overlay: before:content-[''] before:fixed before:inset-0 before:z-[9999] before:pointer-events-none before:bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] before:opacity-[0.03]

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INITIALIZE: Create a `tailwind.config.js` that extends the theme with the colors defined above. Add the fonts to `index.css` via @import.
2. GLOBAL STYLES: In `index.css`, set `body { @apply bg-[#0a0a0a] text-[#ededed] font-body antialiased; }`.
3. LAYOUT: Create a reusable `Layout` component that includes the Navbar and Footer. The Navbar should be sticky and glassmorphic.
4. LANDING PAGE: Build a Hero section with the 'Tetris' grid layout. Use `framer-motion` to animate elements in. Use the `bento_grid` classes for the features section.
5. ROADMAP: Create a vertical timeline or tree view for the roadmap. Each node should be clickable and lead to a Season page.
6. SEASON PAGES: Use a Sidebar layout for navigation between episodes. The main content area should feature the Algorithm Visualizer (D3.js) and explanation text.
7. REACT FLOW: When using React Flow, apply custom styles to nodes. Use `backdrop-blur` and borders that match the Season's color.
8. ALGORITHMS: For D3.js visualizations, ensure they are responsive and use the Season's color palette. They should be interactive (hover, click, drag).
9. ICONS: Use `lucide-react` for all UI icons. Keep them consistent in size (w-5 h-5 or w-6 h-6).
10. THEME: Enforce Dark Mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless specifically requested (the persona dictates a dark, moody 'Lab' feel).
11. UTILS: Create a `cn` utility function (using `clsx` and `tailwind-merge`) for dynamic class names.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: - Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
- Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
- Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
- Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
- Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
- Subtle grain textures and noise overlays are recommended.
- NEVER use AI assistant Emojis (🤖, 🧠, etc.) as primary icons. Use Lucide icons instead.
